mapper.select: SELECT MENU_ID, MENU_NM, MENU_URL, ICON, PARENT_ID, SORT_ORDER, DESCRIPTION, USE_YN, REG_DT FROM MENU WHERE MENU_ID = #{menuId}

SELECT A.MENU_ID, A.MENU_NM, A.MENU_URL, A.ICON, A.PARENT_ID, A.SORT_ORDER, A.DESCRIPTION, A.USE_YN, A.REG_DT, B.MENU_NM AS PARENT_NM FROM MENU A LEFT JOIN MENU B ON A.PARENT_ID = B.MENU_ID WHERE 1=1
AND A.MENU_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND A.MENU_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
ORDER BY A.SORT_ORDER ASC, A.MENU_ID ASC OFFSET #{firstIndex} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{recordCountPerPage} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) totcnt FROM MENU A WHERE 1=1
AND A.MENU_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND A.MENU_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
SELECT MENU_ID, MENU_NM FROM MENU WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SORT_ORDER ASC, MENU_ID ASC
SELECT MENU_ID, MENU_NM, MENU_URL, ICON, PARENT_ID, SORT_ORDER, DESCRIPTION, USE_YN, CONVERT(VARCHAR(19), REG_DT, 120) AS REG_DT FROM MENU ORDER BY SORT_ORDER ASC, MENU_ID ASC

SELECT DISTINCT M.MENU_ID, M.MENU_NM, M.MENU_URL, M.ICON, M.PARENT_ID, M.SORT_ORDER, M.DESCRIPTION, M.USE_YN, CONVERT(VARCHAR(19), M.REG_DT, 120) AS REG_DT FROM MENU M WHERE M.USE_YN = 'Y' AND ( M.MENU_ID IN ( SELECT RM.MENU_ID FROM ROLE_MENU RM INNER JOIN USER_ROLE UR ON RM.ROLE_ID = UR.ROLE_ID WHERE UR.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} ) OR M.MENU_ID IN ( SELECT M2.PARENT_ID FROM MENU M2 INNER JOIN ROLE_MENU RM ON M2.MENU_ID = RM.MENU_ID INNER JOIN USER_ROLE UR ON RM.ROLE_ID = UR.ROLE_ID WHERE UR.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND M2.PARENT_ID IS NOT NULL ) ) ORDER BY M.SORT_ORDER ASC, M.MENU_ID ASC
